entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A pulse crop (Cicer arietinum L.) that is a mandate crop of ICRISAT

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A pulse crop (Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp.) that is a mandate crop of ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which manages mandate pulses and publishes pathology reports

entities.name: PATHOGENS
entities.description: Disease-causing organisms including fungi, bacteria, viruses, mycoplasma, and nematodes that affect chickpea and pigeonpea

entities.name: FUNGI
entities.description: A category of pathogens listed in the world list of chickpea and pigeonpea pathogens

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: A category of pathogens listed in the world list of chickpea and pigeonpea pathogens

entities.name: VIRUSES
entities.description: A category of pathogens listed in the world list of chickpea and pigeonpea pathogens

entities.name: MYCOPLASMA
entities.description: A category of pathogens listed in the world list of chickpea and pigeonpea pathogens

entities.name: NEMATODES
entities.description: A category of pathogens listed in the world list of chickpea and pigeonpea pathogens

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions affecting chickpea and pigeonpea crops

entities.name: WORLD LIST OF CHICKPEA AND PIGEONPEA PATHOGENS
entities.description: A comprehensive resource listing pathogens and their global distribution for chickpea and pigeonpea, revised multiple times by ICRISAT
